name: Morlun
description: This is the guy Spider Man fought for 12 hours straight😭. Morlun is one of Spider-Man’s most terrifying enemies in Marvel Comics, a powerful interdimensional predator who feeds on the life force of animal-totem beings—especially Spider-Totems. He is a member of the vampiric family known as the Inheritors, who travel across the multiverse hunting different versions of Spider-heroes. Unlike traditional vampires, Morlun does not drink blood; instead, he drains the mystical energy that empowers his prey. Possessing overwhelming strength, speed, near-invulnerability, and rapid regeneration, Morlun has brutally defeated versions of Spider-Man and forced them to evolve beyond their limits to survive. Cold, patient, and relentless, he treats his hunts as ritualistic inevitabilities, making him one of the most dangerous threats in the Spider-Verse mythos.
creator: Raycharles
